title: Select All Checkbox for Account Permission Preferences
story: As a product administrator, I want a 'Select All' checkbox on the account permissions page, so that I can quickly grant or revoke all permissions for a shared user without toggling each one individually.
description: Add a 'Select All Permission' checkbox to the account preferences/permissions page. When checked, all individual permission checkboxes are selected. When unchecked, all are deselected. The checkbox also responds to individual changes — if all permissions are manually checked, the Select All checkbox becomes checked; if any single permission is unchecked, Select All becomes unchecked.
acceptance_criteria: A 'Select All Permission' checkbox appears above the individual permission checkboxes
Checking 'Select All' selects all individual permission checkboxes
Unchecking 'Select All' deselects all individual permission checkboxes
Manually checking all individual permissions auto-checks the 'Select All' checkbox
Unchecking any individual permission auto-unchecks the 'Select All' checkbox
ux_changes: New 'Select All Permission' checkbox on the account sharing permissions page with bidirectional sync to individual permission checkboxes. Layout was also updated for improved presentation.
implementation_notes: Implemented with JavaScript toggle logic that synchronizes the Select All checkbox state with individual permission checkboxes in both directions.
comment_summary: Developer added the Select All checkbox with bidirectional sync and updated the layout. Ready for review.
